positive: A stylized, retro-futuristic geometric pattern featuring minimalist interpretations of planets, stars, and abstract cosmic formations. The design should be centered, highly detailed, and suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use strong contrasting colors: deep indigo, vibrant teal, and pops of glowing coral. The composition should create a cohesive, interlocking mandala-like pattern with clear, thick silhouettes and sharp lines, reminiscent of mid-century modern scientific illustrations and stained-glass art. Isolated on a pure white or solid neutral background.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, poor anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, messy lines, gradient background, realistic photo, busy, excessive detail, gradient, clutter
